name: -c
options.description: Execute the Python code in command

name: -m
options.description: Run library module as a script

name: -B
options.description: Do not write .pyc files on import

name: -u
options.description: Force stdin, stdout and stderr to be unbuffered

name: -v
options.description: Print a message each time a module is initialized

name: -V
--version
options.description: Print the Python version number and exit

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print a help message and exit

name: -OO
options.description: Remove assert statements and docstrings (aggressive optimize)

name: -q
options.description: Do not print version and copyright messages on startup

name: -s
options.description: Do not add user site-packages directory to sys.path

name: -S
options.description: Do not imply import site on initialization

name: -b
options.description: Issue a warning when comparing bytes with str or int

name: -W
options.description: Warning control (default, error, ignore, always, module, once)

name: --check-hash-based-pycs
options.description: Control validation of hash-based .pyc files (default, always, or never)

name: -P
options.description: Do not prepend a potentially unsafe path to sys.path
